mano_cua.result_summary: 输入框有文本时按退格键，不仅清空了输入文本，还错误删除了已添加的 world 标签。退格键未正确隔离作用范围。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The screenshot confirms the bug observation. After pressing Backspace once while 'testing' was in the input box: Only 'hellox' (hello tag) remains, the 'world' tag is GONE (deleted), the 'testing' text is GONE from the input. This clearly shows a bug: When Backspace is pressed while there is text in the input field, instead of deleting only the last character from the input text, the component deleted all the text in the input field and also deleted the last tag ('world'). Test Result: FAIL.
